messages.title: Direktmeddelanden

messages.shareWithTitle: Ditt nasta meddelande kommer att innehalla “{{title}}”.
messages.shareWithLink: Ditt nasta meddelande kommer att innehalla en vine-lank.
messages.signerUnsupported: Din nuvarande signer kan logga in dig, men den exponerar inte NIP-44-kryptering an. Byt till en nsec, bunker eller annan signer som stodjer NIP-44 for att anvanda direktmeddelanden pa webben.
messages.supportSummary: Fraga om buggar, moderering eller kontoproblem.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Behöver du hjälp? Vi finns här för att hjälpa dig.
support.helpCenterDescription: Hitta svar på dina frågor om Divine.
support.messageSupportDescription: Kontakta supportinkorgen direkt i Divine med privata NIP-17-meddelanden.
support.contactDescription: Skapa ett ärende så återkommer vi så snart som möjligt.
support.githubDescription: Rapportera buggar, önska funktioner eller bläddra bland befintliga ärenden i våra GitHub-repositorier.
support.communityDescription: Delta i våra gemenskapsdiskussioner och få kontakt med andra Divine-användare på Nostr.
support.communityBody: Divine är byggt på Nostr, ett decentraliserat socialt protokoll. Hitta oss i din favoritklient för Nostr.

zapDialog.sendAZapDescription: Zaps are small Bitcoin payments that support the creator of this item. If you enjoyed this, consider sending a zap!
zapDialog.scanOrCopyHelp: Scan the QR code or copy the invoice to pay with any Lightning wallet.

walletModal.lightningWalletDescription: Connect your lightning wallet to send zaps instantly.
walletModal.noWalletsYet: No wallets yet. Plug one in to start zapping.
walletModal.installHelp: Install a WebLN extension or connect a NWC wallet for zaps.
walletModal.connectNwcWalletDescription: Enter your connection string from a compatible wallet.
walletModal.connectionUriRequiredDescription: Please enter a valid NWC connection URI.
walletModal.activeWalletChangedDescription: The selected wallet is now active for zaps.

profileHeader.classicVineStatsCaption: Stats from the original Vine platform (2013-2017)

loginDialog.title: Sign in to Divine
loginDialog.heading: Get in.
loginDialog.subtitleRegister: Got an invite? Spin up an account.
loginDialog.subtitleSignIn: Sign in at login.divine.video with your existing account.
loginDialog.inviteUnavailable: Invite sign-up is unavailable right now. You can still sign in on the next tab.
loginDialog.extensionHelper: Use your browser extension if you already have a signer set up.
loginDialog.errorExtensionNotFound: Nostr extension not found. Please install a NIP-07 extension.
loginDialog.errorKeyLoginFailed: Failed to login with this key. Please check that it is correct.
loginDialog.errorNsecRequired: Drop your secret key to continue.
loginDialog.errorNsecInvalid: Invalid secret key format. Must be a valid nsec starting with nsec1.
loginDialog.errorBunkerRequired: Drop a bunker URI to continue.
loginDialog.errorBunkerInvalid: Invalid bunker URI format. Must start with bunker://
loginDialog.errorBunkerConnectFailed: Failed to connect to bunker. Please check the URI.
loginDialog.errorFileNoValidKey: File does not contain a valid secret key.

reportContentDialog.description: Help us understand what's wrong with this {{contentType}}
reportContentDialog.loggedOutMessage: You need to be logged in to report content. This helps us verify reports and follow up with you if needed.
reportContentDialog.publicNoticeBody: Reports are published as NIP-56 events on the Nostr network and will be linked to your username. Do not include sensitive or private information in reports.
reportContentDialog.supportPrefix: If you have a sensitive issue to share privately, please use our
reportContentDialog.toastSentDescription: Thanks for watching the community's back.

deleteVideoDialog.title: Delete Video?
deleteVideoDialog.description: This action will send a deletion request to all relays. Most relays will honor this request and remove your video.
deleteVideoDialog.reasonPlaceholder: Why are you deleting this video?
deleteVideoDialog.reasonHelp: This reason will be included in the deletion event sent to relays.
deleteVideoDialog.noteBody: While most relays will remove your video, deletion is not guaranteed. Some relays may choose to keep the content, and users who have already downloaded it will still have access.

viewSourceDialog.title: Video Event Source
viewSourceDialog.noteFetchError: Could not fetch full event from relay. This is a reconstructed representation from cached data.
viewSourceDialog.noteReconstructed: This is a reconstructed representation from parsed data. The original event signature and some tags may not be included.
viewSourceDialog.verifiedBody: This is the complete original event with cryptographic signature.

ageVerificationOverlay.restrictedBody: This content may not be appropriate for all audiences.
ageVerificationOverlay.rememberNote: Your choice will be remembered for 30 days
ageVerificationOverlay.signInHeading: Sign in to view this content
ageVerificationOverlay.signInBody: This content is age-restricted. Sign in so we can confirm your age and load the video.

moderationSettings.heading: Moderation Settings
moderationSettings.subheading: Control what content you see and report violations
moderationSettings.authRequiredDescription: Please log in to manage your moderation settings
moderationSettings.apiModeAutoHelp: Auto follows hostname: staging uses staging, everything else uses production.
moderationSettings.statusFilteringActive: ✓ Content filtering is active across all feeds
moderationSettings.statusNoFilters: No filters running — you're seeing everything.
moderationSettings.addToMuteListDescription: Mute users, hashtags, keywords, or specific content
moderationSettings.noMutedKeywords: No muted keywords. Your feed is raw.
moderationSettings.noReportsYet: You haven't reported any content yet
moderationSettings.toastErrorEnterValue: Please enter a value to mute
moderationSettings.toastMuteFailed: Failed to mute. Please try again.
moderationSettings.toastUnmuteFailed: Failed to unmute. Please try again.

linkedAccountsSettings.authRequiredDescription: Please log in to manage your linked accounts
linkedAccountsSettings.heading: Linked Accounts
linkedAccountsSettings.subheadingPrefix: Verify your identity across platforms using
linkedAccountsSettings.yourLinkedAccountsDescription: Accounts linked to your Nostr identity
linkedAccountsSettings.noAccountsLinked: No accounts linked yet. Connect one below and claim your name.
linkedAccountsSettings.editLinkedAccountDescription: Update the proof for this account
linkedAccountsSettings.linkNewAccountDescription: Prove you own an account on another platform

proofInstructions.github: Create a public GitHub Gist containing the text below, then paste the Gist ID.
proofInstructions.twitter: Post a tweet containing the text below, then paste the Tweet ID from the URL.
proofInstructions.mastodon: Post a toot containing the text below, then paste the Post ID from the URL.
proofInstructions.telegram: Send a message in a public channel/group containing the text below, then paste the message path (e.g. channelname/123).
proofInstructions.bluesky: Post on Bluesky containing the text below, then paste the record key (rkey) from the post URL.
proofInstructions.discord: Create a Discord server with your npub in the server name or description, then create a permanent invite link and paste the invite code.

linkedAccountsSettings.toastEnterProof: Please enter the proof URL or ID
linkedAccountsSettings.toastCannotDetermineUsername: Could not determine username from the URL
linkedAccountsSettings.toastLinkedCheckProof: {{platform}} account linked — check your proof post to verify
linkedAccountsSettings.toastUpdatedCheckProof: {{platform}} account updated — check your proof post to verify

linkedAccounts.identityVerificationDescription: Linked accounts are verified using NIP-39 identity proofs. Only verified accounts are shown.

proofModeBadge.proofManifestDesc: Contains frame hashes and session data

platinum.label: Human Made
platinum.tooltip: Human made - device proof and AI scan both confirm likely human origin
platinum.description: This video has mobile device proof and an AI scan that both support a likely human origin.

verifiedMobile.label: Human Made
verifiedMobile.tooltip: Human made - captured on a real device with hardware-backed proof
verifiedMobile.description: This video was captured on a real device with hardware attestation, cryptographic signatures, and Content Credentials.

verifiedWeb.label: Human Made
verifiedWeb.description: This video was created by a human and has been cryptographically signed with Proofmode. The signature confirms the content has not been altered since creation.

basicProof.label: Human Made
basicProof.tooltip: Human made - basic proof metadata is present
basicProof.description: This video includes basic proof metadata. Some verification information is present but it does not meet the full criteria for stronger verified tiers.
